title: Design homepage mockup
description:
## Overview

Create high-fidelity mockups for the new homepage layout.

### Requirements

- Hero section with animated gradient background
- Feature grid showcasing top 3 product capabilities
- Social proof section with customer logos and testimonials
- CTA section with email capture form

### Notes

Refer to the brand guidelines v2.1 for color palette and typography. The design should be responsive and work across all breakpoints.

title: Implement design system tokens
description:
## Overview

Set up the design token system using CSS custom properties.

### Scope

- Color tokens (primary, secondary, neutral scales)
- Typography tokens (font families, sizes, weights, line heights)
- Spacing scale (4px base unit)
- Border radius and shadow tokens

### Acceptance Criteria

All tokens must be documented and available as Tailwind utility classes.

title: Set up CI/CD pipeline
description:
## Overview

Configure automated deployment pipeline for the redesigned website.

### Tasks

- Set up GitHub Actions workflow
- Configure preview deployments for PRs
- Add Lighthouse CI for performance budgets
- Set up staging and production environments

### Dependencies

Blocked until the build configuration (task-2) is finalized.

title: Migrate blog to MDX
description:
## Overview

Convert the existing blog from a CMS to MDX-based content stored in the repository.

### Rationale

- Faster build times
- Version-controlled content
- Component embedding in posts
- Better developer experience for content authors

title: Accessibility audit
description:
## Overview

Conduct a full WCAG 2.2 AA compliance audit of the redesigned pages.

### Checklist

- Color contrast ratios (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text)
- Keyboard navigation and focus management
- Screen reader compatibility (VoiceOver, NVDA)
- Form labeling and error messaging
- Motion and animation preferences (prefers-reduced-motion)

### Deliverables

Audit report with severity-ranked findings and remediation recommendations.

title: Implement offline data sync
description:
## Overview

Build a reliable offline-first data synchronization layer.

### Architecture

- Local SQLite database for offline storage
- Conflict resolution using last-write-wins with vector clocks
- Background sync when connectivity is restored
- Queue-based mutation tracking

### Edge Cases

- Handle partial sync failures gracefully
- Manage storage quotas on low-end devices
- Support data migration between schema versions

title: Push notification service
description:
## Overview

Integrate push notifications for iOS and Android.

### Requirements

- Firebase Cloud Messaging for Android
- APNs for iOS
- Notification preferences per user
- Silent notifications for background data refresh
- Deep linking from notification tap

title: Navigation redesign
description:
## Overview

Redesign the bottom tab navigation with the new design language.

### Changes

- New icon set (SF Symbols on iOS, Material on Android)
- Animated tab transitions
- Badge indicators for unread items
- Haptic feedback on selection

title: Performance profiling
description:
## Overview

Profile and optimize app startup time and scroll performance.

### Targets

- Cold start under 2 seconds on mid-range devices
- 60fps scroll in all list views
- Memory usage under 150MB during normal operation
- Bundle size reduction of at least 20%

title: Design API authentication flow
description:
## Overview

Design the authentication and authorization system for the public API.

### Options Under Consideration

- OAuth 2.0 with PKCE for third-party apps
- API keys for server-to-server integration
- JWT tokens with refresh rotation

### Requirements

- Scoped permissions per API key
- Rate limiting tied to authentication tier
- Audit logging for all authentication events

title: Rate limiting implementation
description:
## Overview

Implement distributed rate limiting for the API gateway.

### Strategy

- Token bucket algorithm with Redis backend
- Per-endpoint and per-user limits
- Graduated response (warning headers → 429 → temporary ban)
- Dashboard for monitoring rate limit usage

### SLAs

- Free tier: 100 requests/minute
- Pro tier: 1000 requests/minute
- Enterprise: custom limits

title: Documentation portal scaffold
description:
## Overview

Build the developer documentation portal with interactive API explorer.

### Features

- OpenAPI spec rendering
- Interactive request builder (try it out)
- Code samples in multiple languages
- Versioned documentation
- Search with Algolia integration
